title: Tensura: Mythos
description: Tensura: Mythos is an addon to the Tensura: Reincarnated mod.
body:
Tensura: Mythos is an addon for the Tensura: Reincarnated mod which aims to add custom races, skills and other miscellaneous ideas that we think could either be useful or funny in-game.

Currently, the addon features the addition of three race lines; Canine, Maiden, and Lesser Serpent; two Unique Skills; Faker and Omniscient Eye; and more on the way as we continue to work on the addon.

This addon also requires  [Tensura: Mysticism](https://modrinth.com/mod/tensura-mysticism) to be installed.

Our discord server has all the information on the currently available, and planned Skills and Races, alongside a channel for the community to make suggestions for future additions.

https://discord.gg/JRN5K5FuKf
